package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for domain_constants_declared_in_handler_package: Domain enums, statuses, and lifecycle constants that live in handler packages instead of domain-facing packages.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule025NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule025NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule025NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario025Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule025NegativeService, input Rule025NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
